headline: Dividend Income Update Q2, Q3, Q4 2025

headline: Forbes Includes Philip Morris International in Its Net Zero Leaders List
summary: STAMFORD, CT, May 04, 2026--Philip Morris International (PMI) (NYSE: PM) has been included once more in Forbes’ 2026 Net Zero Leaders1 list, recognizing its leadership and continued progress in advancing climate action across its global operations.
